explanation: Attempted to reproduce the bug by installing language-pack-de, snapd, and various test snaps to check the locale behavior of snapctl services. However, none of the snaps tested (test-snap-components-snapctl, prometheus, hello-world) provided a suitable context for testing snapctl services behavior. Unable to verify the locale-related output.
script:
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y language-pack-de
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y snapd
export LANG=de_DE.UTF-8
snap install --edge test-snap-components-snapctl
snap run --shell test-snap-components-snapctl.test -c 'snapctl services'
